_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: Using NF2-specific antibodies, we found intense immunostaining throughout gray and white matter regions of the brain...No such staining could be observed when the primary antibody was omitted
details: Demonstrated intense immunostaining throughout gray and white matter regions with no staining when primary antibody was omitted; staining could be blocked by antibody-specific blocking peptide
